items.content: Discussed the latest EU directive on single-use plastics with the AI, seeking clarification on specific exemptions for biodegradable packaging in food service.
Asked the AI for historical weather data for the Kungsleden trail in late September over the past 10 years to prepare for my upcoming hike.
Researched potential funding sources for a pilot project on urban composting initiatives in Brandenburg, asking the AI to identify relevant foundations and government grants.
Requested a summary of recent academic papers on the economic benefits of circular economy models in the German automotive sector.
Asked for a recipe for traditional German sauerkraut, specifying a preference for a longer fermentation period.
Generated a draft presentation outline for my upcoming lecture on 'Policy levers for achieving a circular economy in small and medium-sized enterprises'.
Searched for upcoming performances of Wagner's 'Der Ring des Nibelungen' at the Berlin State Opera and other major German opera houses.
Asked the AI to find cycling routes from my home in Prenzlauer Berg to the Freie Universität campus, prioritizing bike lanes and avoiding major roads.
Investigated the feasibility of a new national recycling standard for electronic waste, requesting data on current collection rates and potential economic impacts.
Queried the AI about the history and cultural significance of traditional pickling methods in Northern Europe.
